items.title: Trump intensifies trade war with 30% tariffs on EU and Mexico | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>President Trump warned of 30% tariffs on imports from Mexico and the EU starting August 1, after trade talks with both allies failed to yield a deal.

items.title: US couple wins Wife-Carrying World Championship
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>The 2025 Wife-Carrying World Championship wrapped up in Sonkajarvi, Finland, with over 200 people from 18 countries taking part.
 
"Never done anything like that, jumping into the water puddle with my wife," newly crowned world champion Caleb Roesler said.
 
#finland #competition #sport #trophy #wife

items.title: Israel strikes Gaza as truce talks faltering over withdrawal | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>WARNING: SENSITIVE CONTENT
Israeli airstrikes on Gaza killed at least 16 people and wounded several others, Palestinian medical sources said, as ceasefire negotiations in Doha faltered over the scope of Israeli withdrawal from the enclave.

items.content:

items.title: Are Elon Musk’s dreams of Mars over?
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>President Trump’s ‘big, beautiful bill’ has given $10 billion to NASA, boosting the space agency’s efforts to again walk on the moon. Elon Musk has argued against returning to the lunar surface – so has SpaceX’s planned mission to Mars been grounded? Peter Devlin takes a look at what’s going on.
 
#musk #mars #moon #nasa #trump #space #News #Reuters #Newsfeed

items.title: The hardening of NATO's northern frontier
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Along the border of Finland and Russia, tensions reminiscent of the Cold War have resurfaced. We visit the forested 832-mile frontier, Europe’s longest with Russia.

items.title: Air India crash report shows pilot confusion over engine switch movement | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>WARNING: SENSITIVE CONTENT
A preliminary report into the Air India crash in the Indian state of Gujarat showed the plane's fuel cutoff switches almost simultaneously flipped from run to cutoff three seconds after takeoff, starving the engines of fuel.
